name: Light Frame
description: Expands grid slots at the cost of durability.

name: Reinforced Frame
description: High HP but adds significant torque stress.

name: Gyro Stabilizer
description: Reduces torque imbalance penalty by 30%.

name: Shock Bracing
description: Reduces recoil displacement accumulation by 50%.

name: Joint Lock
description: Prevents limb detachment on structural failure. Increases heat.

name: Reactor Core
description: Primary power source. Generates steady output with heat cost.

name: Micro Reactor
description: Cheap low-power generator. Slightly unstable.

name: Capacitor Bank
description: Stores burst power. Explodes on overload dealing 30 AoE damage.

name: Power Router
description: Adjacent power modules gain +10% efficiency instead of +5%.

name: Pulse Cannon
description: Reliable direct-fire weapon. Low recoil.

name: Railgun
description: Extreme single-shot damage. Heavy recoil and heat spike.

name: Plasma Saw
description: High-DPS melee-range weapon. Generates intense heat.

name: Missile Pod
description: Fires a burst of 3 projectiles after a short delay.

name: Shard Cannon
description: Scatters shards — lower per-shard damage, hits multiple cells.

name: Gravity Mine
description: Deploys a mine that pulls the enemy toward it before detonating.

name: EMP Burst
description: Deals no HP damage. Locks one random enemy module for 3 seconds.

name: Echo Cannon
description: Duplicates the previous projectile from a temporal echo. Adds Paradox.

name: Kinetic Plating
description: Flat HP buffer. Reliable baseline mitigation.

name: Reactive Armor
description: Reduces burst damage by 30% once every 3 seconds.

name: Energy Shield
description: Rechargeable shield buffer that absorbs damage before HP.

name: Reflective Field
description: Reflects 20% of incoming projectile damage back at the attacker.

name: Temporal Barrier
description: Reverts all damage taken in the last 1.2 seconds. High Paradox cost.

name: Heat Sink
description: Passively dissipates heat in its quadrant.

name: Radiator Loop
description: High-throughput heat dissipation. Covers the full quadrant.

name: Liquid Coolant Loop
description: Cools adjacent cells by 50% of their heat gain each tick.

name: Overdrive Vent
description: Dumps all quadrant heat instantly at the cost of 15 HP per activation.

name: Rewind Shield
description: Resets shield to its value from 2 seconds ago once per fight.

name: Future Sight
description: +15% accuracy. Predicts enemy fire to avoid 10% of shots.

name: Pre-Fire Snapshot
description: All weapons fire 0.5 seconds early on combat start. High Paradox.

name: Timeline Split
description: Creates a ghost clone of the mech for 1.5 seconds. Extreme Paradox.

name: Entropy Field
description: Randomizes one stat of the enemy mech every second.

name: Paradox Reactor
description: +50% power generation. Each tick adds heavy Paradox load.

name: Targeting Matrix
description: Focuses all weapons on the lowest-HP enemy module.

name: Counter-Program
description: After taking a hit, queues an immediate retaliation shot.

name: Burst Logic
description: Holds all weapon fire until capacitor is full, then releases in a salvo.

name: Chrono Anchor
description: Tech slot counter: reduces enemy Paradox gain rate by 20%.

name: Carbon Weave
description: Ultra-light expansion piece. Minimal mass, minimal protection.

name: Armored Chassis
description: Battle-hardened chassis plate. Massive HP at the cost of significant weight.

name: Blast Plating
description: Thermal-resistant armor. Absorbs impact and bleeds off heat.

name: Fusion Core
description: High-output fusion reactor. Feeds power-hungry weapons at a thermal cost.

name: Solar Tap
description: Passive energy collector. No heat output, but low power yield.

name: Overcharge Cell
description: Overclocked power cell. Enormous energy at the cost of temporal stability.

name: Scatter Burst
description: Rapid-fire scattergun. Low per-shot damage, overwhelming volume.

name: Twin Blaster
description: Dual-barrel energy blaster. Balanced sustained DPS for any build.

name: Arc Lance
description: Electromagnetic discharge. Zero recoil but generates extreme heat.

name: Siege Cannon
description: The heaviest mount. Fires rarely but devastates on impact.

name: Auto Turret
description: Automated minigun. Constant low-damage harassment with minimal recoil.

name: Void Spike
description: Crystallized void projectile. Slow fire rate, punishing single-shot damage.

name: Ablative Plating
description: Expendable armor layer. Cheap HP with no secondary effects.

name: Dampening Shell
description: Layered alloy shell. Blocks energy and dissipates thermal buildup.

name: Fortress Shell
description: Fortress-grade energy barrier. Enormous shield capacity for siege builds.

name: Thermal Wick
description: Passive heat conductor. Continuously bleeds heat with no power cost.

name: Phase Cooler
description: Phase-change coolant pack. Moderate cooling plus minor structural HP.

name: Cryo Injector
description: High-pressure cryo fluid. Aggressive cooling at significant power cost.

name: Stasis Matrix
description: Temporal stasis field. Absorbs incoming damage as Paradox.

name: Time Dilation
description: Slows local time. Greatly increases durability at the cost of extreme Paradox.

name: Void Resonator
description: Channels void resonance. Enormous power generation at maximum temporal instability.

name: Overload Safeguard
description: AI-managed thermal safety system. Prevents cascading thermal failures.

name: Repair Drone
description: Autonomous repair unit. Regenerates 10 HP per second mid-combat.

name: Targeting Jammer
description: Disrupts enemy targeting. Adds 15% accuracy penalty to all incoming shots.
